parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly admits to being a Doppelganger who copied a Werewolf role ('I copycatted into a werewolf and I joined Tyler at night'). Tyler also admits to waking up with Justin as a Werewolf. While both appear to be on Team Werewolf, Justin's admission is direct and consistent throughout the latter half of the discussion.
